summary: First full test run of the migrated Papegojregistret app (FastAPI + MongoDB + React). Backend: 43/43 pytest tests pass covering auth (register/login/me/logout/refresh/google-invalid), admin stats/users/birds/discount-codes/feedback/comments/activity, CSV exports, role protection, block/unblock login gating, duplicate ring_number, Swedish phone validation. Frontend: login → admin dashboard (KPIs + charts), registered-birds table with search+CSV+edit dialog, users list, discount codes CRUD (create verified in table), feedback/comments/activity pages, found-birds, public landing → register bird form → success redirect, /rapportera-hittad, /hittade-faglar list, route protection (anon → /login, non-admin → /). All primary flows work end-to-end.

issues: React warning: 'Cannot update a component (BrowserRouter) while rendering a different component (Login)'. Login.jsx is calling a state setter (likely navigate() or setUser) during render instead of inside useEffect. Non-blocking but should be fixed.
Radix Dialog warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent'. Accessibility warning – add DialogDescription.

action_items: Fix setState-in-render warning in /app/frontend/src/pages/Login.jsx – move navigate() call out of render into useEffect (currently calls navigate() based on user role during render when already authenticated).
Add DialogDescription (or aria-describedby) to admin dialogs in DiscountCodes.jsx, RegisteredBirds.jsx edit dialogs to silence Radix accessibility warning.
(Nice-to-have) Consider adding a client-side loading state to /admin/registered-birds so 'Laddar…' is visible longer during first paint after direct URL navigation.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1107 lines – consider splitting by domain (auth, admin_users, admin_birds, discount_codes, public) into routers/*.py for maintainability.
Two @app.on_event('startup')/('shutdown') handlers are deprecated in FastAPI; switch to lifespan context manager.
In server.py:1103 `allow_credentials=cors_origins != '*'` – correct guard for wildcard, but recommend explicitly listing origins always (already the case via env).

Discount-code apply flow: `POST /api/registered-birds` calculates final_amount but never increments discount_codes.used_count. Once payment=completed the usage_limit check will never trip. Consider incrementing used_count when the code is applied (or on payment completion).
`registered_birds.image_urls` filter in /public-birds requires `payment_status: completed`; that's fine, just ensure this matches product expectation.
seed_admin does not update `updated_at`; also missing `first_name/last_name` update on existing admin – minor.
Login.jsx auto-redirects authenticated user via setState-in-render pattern; move to useEffect.

AuthContext refreshUser sets user=false on failure – acceptable, but /auth/me returns 401 for anonymous which is normal; the two 401 errors on every public page load pollute console. Consider treating 401 silently.
test_credentials: admin@papegojregistret.se / Admin123!  and  test@papegojregistret.se / Test123! (both seeded and verified working). PARROTS15 discount code seeded and validated.
seed_data_creation: Backend startup seeds admin, test user, 5 sample birds (SE100000–SE100004), PARROTS15 discount, 1 sample found-bird. Tests created transient UI test data (TESTR*, UICODE*, TEST_reg_*) but cleaned/left as harmless test rows.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py – configured to use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Uses parallel execution via pytest-xdist with loadscope. When testing UI, use sidebar click navigation OR always give ~2500ms after page.goto for data to load (admin table pages load data via 200ms debounced useEffect, cookies attached automatically). Non-blocking issues: Login.jsx setState-in-render warning and Radix DialogDescription warning – both fine functionally but should be addressed for cleanliness.
rca_of_the_issue: No blocking issues. The only backend test failure was a test-side email casing assertion (backend correctly lowercases email; assertion updated). The initial UI failure on /admin/registered-birds was a test-timing issue with insufficient wait after direct page.goto; confirmed working via sidebar navigation and with proper wait.
